items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the explanation of approval necessity.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an explanation of why approval was or was not required. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for such explanations but lacks specific evidence to confirm their existence or functionality, leading to an inconclusive status.
